summary.title: Professional Summary
summary.text: Full Stack Developer with 5+ years building scalable web applications, IoT platforms, and AI-powered automation systems. Expertise in React, Node.js, TypeScript, and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Supabase). Proven track record architecting SaaS platforms, implementing real-time systems, and leading technical initiatives.

eng-futuro.title: Full Stack Developer
bullets: Architected complete platform refactor with design system and component guidelines using React + TypeScript
Built Web Serial API-based firmware installer automating ESP32/ESP8266 flash process and serial communication directly in browser

bots-channel.title: CTO & Co-Founder
bullets: Architected serverless SaaS platform for multi-channel chatbot automation (WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram) using AWS Lambda and Node.js
Implemented custom authentication system, JSON-based flow processing engine, and no-code visual workflow builder
Scaled infrastructure to support concurrent multi-channel message processing with PostgreSQL backend

comunica-mulher.title: Research Scholar - Developer
bullets: Built complaint management system with complete moderation workflow using Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase
Implemented granular Row-Level Security (RLS) policies, data sanitization pipeline, and advanced admin dashboard with filtering
Architected security-focused system with complete audit trail for LGBTQ+ support platform

include-gurias.title: Research Scholar - Developer
bullets: Architected fullstack institutional platform with custom headless CMS using Next.js, React, and Supabase
Implemented authentication system, interactive chatbot, and admin dashboard with complete CRUD for educational content management
Designed and deployed strategic caching architecture handling 1000+ concurrent users

eng-futuro-volunteer.title: Frontend & Embedded Developer
bullets: Led technical Front-End workshop covering React architecture and code patterns for team of 5+ developers
Developed embedded firmware (C/Python), web interface (React), and REST API, integrating microcontroller hardware with fullstack application

freelance-designer.title: Freelance Graphic Designer
bullets: Managed end-to-end design projects for multiple clients maintaining 98.7% satisfaction rate
Delivered visual identities, promotional materials, and motion graphics using Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects

heartopia-guide.name: Heartopia Guide
heartopia-guide.subtitle: Production Content Platform
bullets: Built SEO-focused Next.js platform with dynamic routing and data-driven pages using App Router
Implemented structured content ingestion pipeline and strategic caching for 100k+ monthly visitors

weeb-profile.name: Weeb Profile
weeb-profile.subtitle: Multi-API Integration & Automation
bullets: Engineered dynamic SVG generation system aggregating real-time data from Last.fm, MyAnimeList, and GitHub APIs
Built automated pipeline via GitHub Actions for data collection, processing, and deployment

windows-xp-online.name: Windows XP Online
windows-xp-online.subtitle: Real-Time Multiplayer System
bullets: Architected faithful Windows XP recreation in browser with WebSockets real-time multiplayer, draggable windows, themes
Implemented multitasking event system, WebSocket synchronization, and persistent state management
